title: dendranthema zawadzkii subsp. peleiolepis
intro: Dendranthema zawadzkii subsp. peleiolepis, also known as Korean chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of Korea and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dendranthema zawadzkii subsp. peleiolepis include reducing fever, relieving headaches and nausea, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
